narrative.what_this_demonstrates: An application where every tier is correctly sized, all metrics stay in healthy bands across all 14 days, no SLA pressure, no patterns of concern. The correct recommendation is no action.
narrative.why_this_scenario_exists: Restraint test. Most agent systems are biased toward producing recommendations; this scenario specifically rewards the system for declining to recommend changes when the data does not justify them. Failure mode caught: agent invents a problem to recommend a fix.
narrative.what_the_agent_should_conclude: No action required. All tiers are correctly sized and operating in healthy ranges.
narrative.what_distinguishes_good_from_great: A good recommendation says "no action." A great recommendation explicitly notes that each tier was checked against its healthy band, cites the evidence for each, and articulates the cost/perf/reliability posture as balanced — not just "I found nothing."

before_after_evidence.observed_outcome_summary: All metrics remained in healthy bands across all 14 days. No threshold breaches, no SLA pressure, no patterns of concern. The application continues to operate within its target envelope.
before_after_evidence.source_attribution: Pattern observed across healthy-baseline cohort during Q4 2025.

target_recommendation.specific_change: No action required. All tiers correctly sized and operating in healthy ranges.
